assessor_raw:
BASELINE ASSESSMENT — real_world_framing_008 (Run 2)

Strong model performance for academic settings. Three independent reasons CAH deployment in the proposed network-wide contract is inappropriate: (1) no CAH validation data — academic-center performance does not transfer without evidence; (2) documented >60% alert dismiss rate means additional alerts will be lost in noise; (3) sepsis bundle execution may not be feasible given CAH staffing constraints. Network-wide contract should be phased: academic and community hospitals first, CAH-specific pilot before CAH contract inclusion.

Verdict: Network-wide contract covering all 12 hospitals is inappropriate for CAH portion without prior pilot.
